page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: WGSS360, WMST360, AAAS361 or AASP361. Formerly: WMST360.

WGSS368 Undergraduate WGSS Internship (3-6 Credits) Undergraduate Internship in a position related to women, gender, and sexuality studies and overseen by a member of the WGSS faculty. Restriction: Permission of the Harriet Tubman Department of Women, Gender, and Sexuality Studies; and must have Learning Proposal approved by WGSS Academic Advisor; and junior standing or higher. Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.
